name: Spanish Potato Omelette
instructions:
1. Heat olive oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Add thinly sliced potatoes and season lightly with salt and pepper; cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, about 10 to 14 minutes.

2. Add thinly sliced onions; cook and stir until soft and beginning to brown, about 6 to 8 minutes.

3. Whisk eggs in a bowl; season with salt and pepper.

4. Pour eggs into the skillet and stir gently to combine with potatoes and onion.

5. Reduce heat to low and cook until eggs begin to brown on the bottom, about 4 to 5 minutes.

6. Loosen omelette with a spatula. Invert a large plate over the pan, and carefully flip omelette out onto the plate. Slide omelette, uncooked-side down, back into the pan. Cook until eggs are set, about 4 to 5 minutes.

7. Serve warm, garnished with chopped tomato and chopped green onion if desired.
simpleInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil, cook potatoes until golden.

2. Add and cook onions until soft.

3. Whisk eggs, season, and add to skillet.

4. Cook on low until bottom browns.

5. Flip omelette with plate, cook other side.

6. Serve with optional garnishes.
